description: heartbeat/leaseRenew 豁免内部退避(wire-protocol §C):单次失败不走 register/claim/report 的指数退避序列,而是跳过本 tick、等下一个调度 tick 再试。heartbeat 返 503 → retry:false,maxAttempts:1。与 09(report 5xx 走 [200,400,800]×3 退避)成对照,锁定'这俩单次失败等下一 tick'的豁免。

then.sdkExpectedAction: skip this heartbeat tick on a single 503; do NOT run the exponential backoff sequence; retry on the next scheduled tick
sdkMustNot: back off internally on a heartbeat failure
treat a single heartbeat 503 as fatal
